meta.incident: Upstream app-svc crashes at 14:08: initial connect() refused errors escalate to no live upstreams / no servers available (crit), amid recurring upstream response timeout distractor on /api/v1/slow

ground_truth.needle: no live upstreams while connecting to upstream

ground_truth.desc: nginx crit: upstream group fully exhausted

evidence.text: 2026/05/04 13:50:15 [warn] 2#0: *4 upstream response timeout (60s) exceeded, client: <ip>, server: api.internal, request: "GET /api/v1/slow HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://app-svc:8080/api/v1/slow"
2026/05/04 13:50:45 [warn] 4#0: *7 upstream response timeout (60s) exceeded, client: <ip>, server: api.internal, request: "GET /api/v1/slow HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://app-svc:8080/api/v1/slow"

2026/05/04 14:08:01 [error] 3#0: *73 connect() failed (111: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream, client: <ip>, server: api.internal, request: "GET /api/v1/users HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://app-svc:8080/api/v1/users", host: "api.internal"

2026/05/04 14:08:03 [error] 2#0: *74 connect() failed (111: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream, client: <ip>, server: api.internal, request: "POST /api/v1/orders HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://app-svc:8080/api/v1/orders", host: "api.internal"

2026/05/04 14:08:07 [error] 4#0: *78 no live upstreams while connecting to upstream, client: <ip>, server: api.internal, request: "GET /api/v1/users HTTP/1.1", upstream: "upstream://app-backend/api/v1/users", host: "api.internal"

2026/05/04 14:08:08 [error] 3#0: *79 no live upstreams while connecting to upstream, client: <ip>, server: api.internal, request: "GET /api/v1/orders HTTP/1.1", upstream: "upstream://app-backend/api/v1/orders", host: "api.internal"
